description:
# Map Shopify locations to Nexus warehouses

Shopify exposes locations (warehouses, retail floor, etc.). Each must map to a real Nexus warehouse **in the same company** as this account.

On the Shopify Account form:

1. Click **Fetch Shopify Locations**.
2. The **Shopify Warehouse Mapping** child table populates with each Shopify location.
3. For each row, set **Nexus Warehouse** (filtered to this account's company).
4. Save.

The first row's warehouse acts as the **Default Warehouse** for that account if not separately set.

> Note: this step auto-completes when you click the action button. Make sure you've actually filled the mapping table — sync will fail later if rows are blank.
name: Map Shopify Locations
title: Map Shopify locations to warehouses
